# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { Middleware } from '@vercel/node';
import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';

const authMiddleware: Middleware = async (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) => {
  const token = req.cookies['auth-token'];

  if (!token) {
    // Unauthenticated request
    return;
  }

  try {
    // Verify the auth token
    const decodedToken = verifyAuthToken(token);

    // Authenticated request
    req.user = decodedToken;
    return;
  } catch (error) {
    // Invalid or expired auth token
    res.status(401).json({ message: 'Invalid authentication token' });
    return;
  }
};

export default authMiddleware;
